response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Demonstrated ability to lead technical projects across diverse stacks and domains
Strong open-source contributions and knowledge-sharing via workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or discovery sessions
AI/ML experience appears incidental rather than core focus over 8+ years
